text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been a while since I've had a day off, so I decide to go shopping
for some essentials. I bump into a familiar face at the mall.

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Sob, sob...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
There, there. I'm sure it was scary, right? But everything's gonna be
okay now.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Just wait here for a second, okay? I'll... umm...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Perfect timing—it seems like this little girl here got lost.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I found her crying in the corner by herself and tried to ask her what's
wrong...

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Sob, sob...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Aw, was it scary being alone? There, there. It's okay now.

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Umm... I... don't know... waaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crap, I shouldn't have asked that question! She's bawling now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I quickly take out my handkerchief from my pocket and wipe the girl's
face.

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Sob, sob...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Aww, Trainer! Thank you so much.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Your face is all cleaned up now. Isn't that nice? So tell me... were you
out here shopping?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The little girl gives a small nod.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I see! What did you want to buy?

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
I wanted... an Umagical Wand... because Papa and Mama said...
they'd buy it for me...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well, isn't that nice? You must've been excited! Does that mean you
came here together with your Papa and Mama?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The little girl nods again. There's no doubt that she's lost. I pause,
thinking about the best thing to do in this situation...
choice_data_list:
I'll go to the information desk and let the staff
know!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Yes, please do. I'll stay here with her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I approach the desk, I see a husband and wife standing there,
faces stricken with worry. They must be the girl's parents!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, thank you so much for your help today. I'm so glad that little
girl was able to reunite with her parents.
choice_data_list: I didn't really do anything though...
I didn't really do anything though...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: No, really. Be proud of yourself—you were such a big help.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Until you showed up, I wasn't sure what I was going to do. I couldn't
just walk away with the girl, so I thought about calling for help...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: But there weren't any staff nearby either. Honestly, I felt stuck.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: So when you came, it was a huge relief. I was really happy to see you.
choice_data_list: But I made the poor girl cry...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, maybe it wouldn't hurt to learn a bit more about how to handle
little kids.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: But really though... I felt safe with you being there.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I appreciated having you with me, so please don't put yourself down.
choice_data_list:
I suppose I've become a little more reliable
then.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: And you didn't forget your handkerchief this time. Good job! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I can't help myself though. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though our dynamics haven't changed much, I feel that I was
able to gain more of Super Creek's trust today.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: (I'm glad I can depend on you, Trainer.)
